name: Black Walnut Cottage Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat thoroughly.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk.
5. Fold in the chopped black walnuts and vanilla flavoring.
6. Pour the batter into a shallow, well-oiled baking pan.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 30 minutes.
8. Serve with vanilla or hard sauce.
